element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary tool throughout; player learns wall-pressing and blind-fire mechanics early
Core tactical element; enemies use same mechanic, introducing threat parity
Maze-like level navigation; establishes spatial puzzle-solving
Progressive power curve; Androthi allies act as checkpoint vendors
Enemy complexity scales with player power; weapon upgrades keep pace
Tougher enemy types; tests mastered mechanics against new challenges
Climactic encounter; combines all learned mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Discovering safe rooms or ally checkpoints
Brief cinematic story moments (Galadril confrontation, final victory)
typical_tension_triggers: Maze-like level layout forcing exploration under threat
Progressive area transitions introducing new enemy types
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension with gunfight encounters interspersed between maze navigation; pressure builds across 4-area progression as enemies scale; relief provided by upgrades and area transitions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to wall-press defense and gunfighting mechanics in Androth mines; basic enemy encounters; focus on learning rather than survival
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Karrellian forests/swamps introduce intermediate enemy variety; weapon upgrades available; maze complexity increases; player power grows but enemies begin scaling
difficulty_curve.late_game: Wasteland desert and Shadow Keep feature elite enemy variants; all mechanics fully integrated; final boss represents skill check on mastered systems
notable_spikes: First enemy gunfight encounter (introduction of lethal threat)
Transition to Wasteland area (enemy difficulty jump)
Sarlac boss fight (culmination of all mechanics and enemy types)

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels structured as interconnected rooms requiring key collection and spatial navigation; player learns layout through exploration under moderate threat
Linear confrontation spaces where Kyle and enemies can press against walls to avoid incoming fire; blind-fire mechanic adds tactical depth
Androthi allies stationed at logical progression points; provide weapon upgrades and serve as relief moments between combat sections
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Scattered across Androth and Karrellian areas

notable_level_patterns.description: Each major area (Mines → Forests → Wasteland → Shadow Keep) introduces new enemy types that match player's upgraded weapon capability
